problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
